suite.invocation: GROK_E2E=1 GROK_E2E_CANCEL=1 GROK_E2E_MODEL=grok-4.5 GROK_E2E_EFFORT=low npm run test:e2e

cases.name: read-only review preserves every fixture file
isolated read-only ACP task reads the repository without changing it
stop-time review gate runs against a clean repository without mutation
write task creates only the requested sentinel
resume loads the same Grok session
nested companion invocation from a Grok task is refused
transfer imports Claude JSONL and resumes it directly with Grok

scope: Authenticated provider qualification for macOS only. Linux remains provider-unverified; Windows provider execution and process control remain unsupported in 0.1.0.
